is_surviving_legally_cohabiting_partner_.name: is_surviving_legally_cohabiting_partner_of
is_surviving_legally_cohabiting_partner_.description: The first person is the surviving legally cohabiting partner of the second person (the deceased).

is_family_principal_residence.name: is_family_principal_residence
is_family_principal_residence.description: The property served as the family's principal residence at the time the estate of the deceased opened.

is_household_effects_of.name: is_household_effects_of
is_household_effects_of.description: The first property represents the household effects present in the second property (the principal residence).

called_to_estate_with_heirs.name: called_to_estate_with_heirs
called_to_estate_with_heirs.description: The first person (surviving partner) is called to the estate of the second person (deceased) together with any heirs.

subject_to_legal_reversion_4_24.name: subject_to_legal_reversion_4_24
subject_to_legal_reversion_4_24.description: The property is the subject of a right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.24.

subject_to_legal_reversion_4_25.name: subject_to_legal_reversion_4_25
subject_to_legal_reversion_4_25.description: The property is the subject of a right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.25.

subject_to_legal_reversion.name: subject_to_legal_reversion
subject_to_legal_reversion.description: The property is subject to a right of legal reversion under article 4.24 or 4.25.

acquires_usufruct_of_principal_residence.name: acquires_usufruct_of_principal_residence
acquires_usufruct_of_principal_residence.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner acquires the usufruct of the immovable property that served as the family's principal residence from the estate of the deceased.

acquires_usufruct_of_household_effects.name: acquires_usufruct_of_household_effects
acquires_usufruct_of_household_effects.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner acquires the usufruct of the household effects present in the family's principal residence from the estate of the deceased.

exercises_usufruct_of_principal_residenc.name: exercises_usufruct_of_principal_residence
exercises_usufruct_of_principal_residenc.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner exercises the right of usufruct over the immovable property that served as the family's principal residence, notwithstanding a right of legal reversion.

exercises_usufruct_of_household_effects.name: exercises_usufruct_of_household_effects
exercises_usufruct_of_household_effects.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner exercises the right of usufruct over the household effects present in the family's principal residence, notwithstanding a right of legal reversion.
